cleavage agent: gel pieces were digested in gel with trypsin as described previously
enrichment method: GFP proteins were immunoprecipitated using GFP-Trap agarose beads
fractionation method: Proteins were purified on a NuPAGE 12% gel
fragmentation method: fragmented in the linear ion trap using collision-induced dissociation
instrument: coupled to an LTQ Orbitrap Elite mass spectrometer
reduction reagent: 10 mM β-ME, 10 mM imidazole and 1% Triton X-100
